name: gogcli-mcp-slides
description: Extended Google Slides for Claude via gogcli — auth + full Slides support (create, edit, export, templates, markdown)

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration (keyring, credential files)

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_slides_export
tools.description: Export a presentation to pdf or pptx

tools.name: gog_slides_info
tools.description: Get metadata for a presentation

tools.name: gog_slides_create
tools.description: Create a new presentation

tools.name: gog_slides_create_from_markdown
tools.description: Create a new presentation from markdown content

tools.name: gog_slides_create_from_template
tools.description: Create from a template with placeholder replacements

tools.name: gog_slides_copy
tools.description: Copy a presentation

tools.name: gog_slides_add_slide
tools.description: Add a slide from a local image

tools.name: gog_slides_insert_image
tools.description: Place a sized, positioned local image on an existing slide

tools.name: gog_slides_list_slides
tools.description: List slides in a presentation

tools.name: gog_slides_delete_slide
tools.description: Delete a slide

tools.name: gog_slides_read_slide
tools.description: Read the content of a slide

tools.name: gog_slides_update_notes
tools.description: Update speaker notes on a slide

tools.name: gog_slides_replace_slide
tools.description: Replace the image on an existing slide (local file or public URL)

tools.name: gog_slides_raw
tools.description: Dump the raw Google Slides API response as JSON (lossless).

tools.name: gog_slides_locate
tools.description: Locate text in shapes and table cells with object IDs and UTF-16 ranges.

tools.name: gog_slides_thumbnail
tools.description: Get or download a rendered thumbnail image for a slide.

tools.name: gog_slides_new_slide
tools.description: Create a native themed slide with a predefined or custom layout.

tools.name: gog_slides_duplicate_slide
tools.description: Duplicate a slide by object ID at a zero-based index.

tools.name: gog_slides_move_slide
tools.description: Move a slide to a zero-based insertion index.

tools.name: gog_slides_insert_text
tools.description: Insert text into a shape or table cell by object ID.

tools.name: gog_slides_style_text
tools.description: Apply range-scoped text styling to one page element.

tools.name: gog_slides_link
tools.description: Apply or clear a hyperlink on a text range in one element.

tools.name: gog_slides_bullets
tools.description: Turn paragraph bullets on or off for a text range.

tools.name: gog_slides_replace_text
tools.description: Scoped find-and-replace (object, slides, or whole presentation).

tools.name: gog_slides_element_create_shape
tools.description: Create a native shape on a slide.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_create_line
tools.description: Create a native line on a slide.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_style
tools.description: Style a shape fill/outline or a line.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_transform
tools.description: Move, resize, rotate, or shear a page element.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_z_order
tools.description: Change element stacking order.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_group
tools.description: Group two or more page elements.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_ungroup
tools.description: Ungroup one or more element groups.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_alt_text
tools.description: Set or clear element accessibility title/description.

tools.name: gog_slides_element_delete
tools.description: Delete one page element by object ID.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_create
tools.description: Create an auto-sized native table on a slide.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_cell_style
tools.description: Style one zero-based table cell (fill, alignment, text).

tools.name: gog_slides_table_border_style
tools.description: Style borders around or within a table cell range.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_column_insert
tools.description: Insert columns left or right of a zero-based column.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_column_delete
tools.description: Delete the column containing a zero-based cell.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_column_size
tools.description: Set a table column's width.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_row_insert
tools.description: Insert rows above or below a zero-based row.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_row_delete
tools.description: Delete the row containing a zero-based cell.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_row_size
tools.description: Set a table row's minimum height.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_merge
tools.description: Merge a rectangular table cell range.

tools.name: gog_slides_table_unmerge
tools.description: Unmerge a rectangular range of merged cells.

tools.name: gog_slides_run
tools.description: Run any gog slides subcommand (escape hatch)
